evidence.text: code review, multi-agent work. Compare against Main Session Cost to understand what fraction of your usage is autonomous parallel work versus direct conversation. Includes the 7-day average and today-vs-yesterday change. #### API-Equivalent Main Session Cost API-equivalent cost from primary conversation turns: your prompts and Claude's direct responses. Excludes subagent and auxiliary tasks. Includes the 7-day average and percentage change. #### API-Equivalent Cost Forecast Daily and monthly projections of API-equivalent cost extrapolated from the current 6-hour burn rate. The 6-hour window smooths out
